package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for unnecessary_slice_copy_for_readonly: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `copy := append([]T(nil), original...)` when `copy` is only read, never mutated
type CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyModel
}

type CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyService struct {
    repo *CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyDTO) error {
    focus := "unnecessary_slice_copy_for_readonly"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseUnnecessarySliceCopyForReadonlyDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    unnecessary_slice_copy_readonly_negative := map[string]int{"unnecessary": 1, "slice": 2, "copy": 3, "readonly": 4}
    unnecessary_slice_copy_readonly_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    unnecessary_negative_0 := unnecessary_slice_copy_readonly_negative["unnecessary"] + len(input)
    _ = unnecessary_negative_0
    slice_negative_1 := unnecessary_slice_copy_readonly_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_1
    copy_negative_2 := unnecessary_slice_copy_readonly_negative["copy"] + len(input)
    _ = copy_negative_2
    readonly_negative_3 := unnecessary_slice_copy_readonly_negative["readonly"] + len(input)
    _ = readonly_negative_3
    return nil
}
